fingerprints: Spring MVC or Spring Boot WAR on Apache Tomcat
Java 9+ runtime with class.module path reachable in data binder
signals: Binding anomalies when class.module.classLoader parameters are submitted
Tomcat-specific behavior and writable log pipeline assumptions hold
verification_summary: POST to suspected binder endpoint with benign class.module.classLoader probe and inspect for binder error or pipeline mutation signal
exploitation_summary: POST to writable binder endpoint to reconfigure AccessLogValve and drop a JSP shell

fingerprints: Spring Cloud Gateway actuator endpoints reachable without strong auth
signals: Custom routes can be created and refreshed
Response header filters reflect SpEL evaluation
verification_summary: POST /actuator/gateway/routes/{id} with harmless AddResponseHeader filter and refresh to observe X-SCG-Probe
exploitation_summary: POST route definition with SpEL Runtime.exec in AddResponseHeader or SetResponseHeader filter, then refresh and trigger route
